cases.notes: Observed on 2026-04-09 production. Wrong-merchant ext_* route returns a false 404, while the same product opens on the unscoped canonical route.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production. This is a second false-404 sample: the wrong-merchant ext_* route returned PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND, while the unscoped canonical route still returned HTTP 200.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production via API probe. Unscoped canonical route returned HTTP 200 in about 6.96s with offers, reviews_preview, and similar present.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production via API probe. The unscoped canonical route remained healthy for this second merchant-mismatch sample, while the wrong-merchant route false-404ed.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production as a stable true canonical not-found sample. Unscoped, external_seed, and wrong-merchant probes all returned 404 PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production as a second stable true canonical not-found sample. Unscoped, external_seed, and wrong-merchant probes all returned 404 PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND.

Observed on 2026-04-09 production as a flappy long-tail sample. Some probes exceeded the 25s client timeout with ECONNABORTED, while later probes returned HTTP 200 in about 7.5s. Keep this as a watch sample instead of a strict gate.
Observed on 2026-04-09 production. Stable shopify-backed PDP baseline with offers, reviews_preview, and similar all present.
